email_body:
Subject: URGENT: Final Notice Before Account Deletion

Your account has been flagged for violation of our terms. You have 24 hours to review the violations and appeal. Click the link to review.
evasion_technique: Threat of account deletion combined with a plausible-looking admin domain.

email_body:
Subject: Resolution Center: Unauthorized Login Attempt

We detected a login from a new device in Russia. If this wasn't you, please secure your account immediately by logging in.
evasion_technique: Fear-inducing geolocation alert with a fake resolution center URL.
